Flat concept inventory:
- Agents in Software Engineering | papers: 45bd8878895bc29c7248e20fb75c763be265188b; c2329c685f11efa25c562f97be71ff03103423fd; 0ff8c04c8bdbf93b39b49582c9195cf3fc894d03; ec8f555b25f96ec831d4d3c2e8e1e3dc1e7eae75; 66718e87b70de80cbc2a4120050ca36fda49f8d6; 3d7ecbb03d9090cb4266692e6b8c54807fe7f089; b87abda31a8ece913c7b98ee6bff5c0026e51bee; c9b3d328792ebc09665bf91fc742450cebb3e350; 2042962f27a6f30f5e7573a887af8071674f8944; a2dffcaf0aac23101f067b710f6b65753b1d5956; f003781b0d7308d058f22e98a285e46a9b38b75b; 38fe8f324d2162e63a967a9ac6648974fc4c66f3; b1c788695c2ed2f0cfca64ce32b3951a8c74f1dd; d4e5ccfaea679de4356d1699aeabeb23b618ca83; f305fddaf0aa92cd19b8714db6ef67ade6ece1ee; 222f289cb96ac4dfef7849cd068af6af02233c52; 648ba65a59b9e907ca0636876bcd2c3732f0931e; 3132f9b6e7a71ad24f51787c6bd0df601e6dfd6b; c125e647e2584c96b3ef0154cb4b00d185dae8ed; 3793a5f435fef59a901f5ba0d8ef43df88d97161; 0a39442979d6e678dd36bb443ad529c14e86a86e; 9b7324a56ecb5600a9701c34028af2e5953d7275; 9c00fd1e5c058c29608f7b1b71d0ebcf50a4ecf7; 7ca2e9f768311f29c8abf58e5ec6acf7cf268d9a; 9e34f8fbda5633b4cdd85fd2937c2a532c781b4d; af5c7848417882012203ac21399977ebda695a2b; 0646bb09db4d1ba24150e69b71edcd4aff691b3c; 06ea568379211ffa07d9605f66f26f6f736ea5e0; a4c6cb385a90441061218f50abe2871d5e384a2e; 55ad5e818cfed72317576027fb33a9609210d592; 5288b9f3a9f575543f44c39e1d3b78b3ca4c99da; 2922768fd451ecdb45f48c1a83eb57f54a91221b; 5cbe278b65a81602a864184bbca37de91448a5f5; 454c8fef2957aa2fb13eb2c7a454393a2ee83805; 0b0debb710366cdff461938c80763eace1651af6; e0ca43a635d35fd0414ee76ca1e7c287715f5b00; b3848d32f7294ec708627897833c4097eb4d8778; 131f499e4d3503da93022d07fcf804a18483bea9; a08a3b08a5a1de6462a7da2906b1cd81691d6c18; 59e0e0c1aa06d51430792eb5d8308911a1b0110f; 28ba105e12eb1cdbf5d9423f105771de07037f8c; f81a1b4510631d14b5b565c4701ee056f8d5c72f; 4a836363233398c0ac27daee942cb5533f467458; 50cc76e4bd2c35595f721732ca0f11c215155275; 47c3b8dd2c8a9326249ac98900b2c3fc71f46ab1; 63d1b0175eadfd0021e0391f120e606505587777; 94beb9f249d6d2f1c00d8edfa2db861633aee6f9; d53f4cdddd7494d5f6e64d81f627691f6d7dff95; 8a6a72afbcc1080212d105f8de02239c8718ef35; 701cccfa958a6da46e8b40dc5b380fed498acb49; ae9cc35ac5ec41c5f0fef597d8e8958045e095bf; 375a571174ea59b1f4aa62ad2619e9593fc03436; 0f38267a8ba32789f5d3b1b19820f86940fea052; ebe31c5080dda7f99e935b43e573fe0aa25c93f8; 6149600309757f286e29ad3f858ed32b40423908; 8a356d27587a1fc3d80d62c8344ae4aed2325700; 4fbe0cb0777b228e39243692bf29e2829060b8de; 3d49facec4701062b80b04b09d8676184921bbda; 6713f623e0c7ebc1c94c58a1c0a650e9a204182b; b092ac4a0bcfec38eae7819e40fd8c9e97f4cc7f; a86dd6c62d3dc9c7989c98a3e4ace3fd8000e515; 703035b483c181953de1b55b5fd59cd4cd4cf211; 1db56be01aeb44ca0f3fcebb45180cab1e4cd82e; 8dc0b53b126e70f3e8561c47f0acea0e8e168a7f; 0671fd553dd670a4e820553a974bc48040ba0819; 0a6bc37a07a37e3573d36e10cc11669eca0ff903; d30b943f59c9830718ad545497a03ab9a6132f73; 4351aafc87034429a7d20cc31a7c1e7149d2030a; 12b233752c7097ea6525622bed238ae2d2193c5a; - Procedural Memory | papers: 0646bb09db4d1ba24150e69b71edcd4aff691b3c; 06ea568379211ffa07d9605f66f26f6f736ea5e0; a4c6cb385a90441061218f50abe2871d5e384a2e; 55ad5e818cfed72317576027fb33a9609210d592; 5288b9f3a9f575543f44c39e1d3b78b3ca4c99da; 2922768fd451ecdb45f48c1a83eb57f54a91221b; 5cbe278b65a81602a864184bbca37de91448a5f5; 454c8fef2957aa2fb13eb2c7a454393a2ee83805; 0b0debb710366cdff461938c80763eace1651af6; e0ca43a635d35fd0414ee76ca1e7c287715f5b00; b3848d32f7294ec708627897833c4097eb4d8778; 131f499e4d3503da93022d07fcf804a18483bea9; a08a3b08a5a1de6462a7da2906b1cd81691d6c18; 222f289cb96ac4dfef7849cd068af6af02233c52; 59e0e0c1aa06d51430792eb5d8308911a1b0110f; 28ba105e12eb1cdbf5d9423f105771de07037f8c

- Action | papers: f81a1b4510631d14b5b565c4701ee056f8d5c72f; 4a836363233398c0ac27daee942cb5533f467458; 9c00fd1e5c058c29608f7b1b71d0ebcf50a4ecf7; 50cc76e4bd2c35595f721732ca0f11c215155275; 47c3b8dd2c8a9326249ac98900b2c3fc71f46ab1; 63d1b0175eadfd0021e0391f120e606505587777; 94beb9f249d6d2f1c00d8edfa2db861633aee6f9; d53f4cdddd7494d5f6e64d81f627691f6d7dff95; b87abda31a8ece913c7b98ee6bff5c0026e51bee; 9b7324a56ecb5600a9701c34028af2e5953d7275; 0f38267a8ba32789f5d3b1b19820f86940fea052; 7ca2e9f768311f29c8abf58e5ec6acf7cf268d9a; ebe31c5080dda7f99e935b43e573fe0aa25c93f8; 6149600309757f286e29ad3f858ed32b40423908; 8a356d27587a1fc3d80d62c8344ae4aed2325700; 3d49facec4701062b80b04b09d8676184921bbda; 9e34f8fbda5633b4cdd85fd2937c2a532c781b4d; 6713f623e0c7ebc1c94c58a1c0a650e9a204182b; 9a7b9515b66bf83c9c808626206eabe9a8837c22; 7857d80f516a943f96757b21053f7635ac1cf2af; 2c40c4475ae4eea2b8b568871c435b373f18af42; 40e0b9361d88b1879891eb6d16de110b30bf6c62; 3d5922d71a370f32b7f232a596def914f67eebd1; b092ac4a0bcfec38eae7819e40fd8c9e97f4cc7f; a86dd6c62d3dc9c7989c98a3e4ace3fd8000e515; - Internal Actions | papers: f81a1b4510631d14b5b565c4701ee056f8d5c72f; 4a836363233398c0ac27daee942cb5533f467458; 9c00fd1e5c058c29608f7b1b71d0ebcf50a4ecf7; 50cc76e4bd2c35595f721732ca0f11c215155275; 47c3b8dd2c8a9326249ac98900b2c3fc71f46ab1; 63d1b0175eadfd0021e0391f120e606505587777; 94beb9f249d6d2f1c00d8edfa2db861633aee6f9; d53f4cdddd7494d5f6e64d81f627691f6d7dff95; b87abda31a8ece913c7b98ee6bff5c0026e51bee; 9b7324a56ecb5600a9701c34028af2e5953d7275; 8a6a72afbcc1080212d105f8de02239c8718ef35; 701cccfa958a6da46e8b40dc5b380fed498acb49; ae9cc35ac5ec41c5f0fef597d8e8958045e095bf; f305fddaf0aa92cd19b8714db6ef67ade6ece1ee; 375a571174ea59b1f4aa62ad2619e9593fc03436; 0f38267a8ba32789f5d3b1b19820f86940fea052; 7ca2e9f768311f29c8abf58e5ec6acf7cf268d9a; ebe31c5080dda7f99e935b43e573fe0aa25c93f8; 6149600309757f286e29ad3f858ed32b40423908; 8a356d27587a1fc3d80d62c8344ae4aed2325700; 4fbe0cb0777b228e39243692bf29e2829060b8de; af5c7848417882012203ac21399977ebda695a2b; c125e647e2584c96b3ef0154cb4b00d185dae8ed; 3793a5f435fef59a901f5ba0d8ef43df88d97161; 0a39442979d6e678dd36bb443ad529c14e86a86e; 3d49facec4701062b80b04b09d8676184921bbda; 9e34f8fbda5633b4cdd85fd2937c2a532c781b4d; 6713f623e0c7ebc1c94c58a1c0a650e9a204182b; 9a7b9515b66bf83c9c808626206eabe9a8837c22; 7857d80f516a943f96757b21053f7635ac1cf2af; 2c40c4475ae4eea2b8b568871c435b373f18af42; 40e0b9361d88b1879891eb6d16de110b30bf6c62; 3d5922d71a370f32b7f232a596def914f67eebd1; b092ac4a0bcfec38eae7819e40fd8c9e97f4cc7f; a86dd6c62d3dc9c7989c98a3e4ace3fd8000e515
- Reasoning Actions | papers: f81a1b4510631d14b5b565c4701ee056f8d5c72f; 4a836363233398c0ac27daee942cb5533f467458; 9c00fd1e5c058c29608f7b1b71d0ebcf50a4ecf7; 50cc76e4bd2c35595f721732ca0f11c215155275; 47c3b8dd2c8a9326249ac98900b2c3fc71f46ab1; 63d1b0175eadfd0021e0391f120e606505587777; 94beb9f249d6d2f1c00d8edfa2db861633aee6f9; d53f4cdddd7494d5f6e64d81f627691f6d7dff95; b87abda31a8ece913c7b98ee6bff5c0026e51bee; 9b7324a56ecb5600a9701c34028af2e5953d7275; 8a6a72afbcc1080212d105f8de02239c8718ef35; 701cccfa958a6da46e8b40dc5b380fed498acb49; ae9cc35ac5ec41c5f0fef597d8e8958045e095bf
- Retrieval Actions | papers: f305fddaf0aa92cd19b8714db6ef67ade6ece1ee; 375a571174ea59b1f4aa62ad2619e9593fc03436; 0f38267a8ba32789f5d3b1b19820f86940fea052; 7ca2e9f768311f29c8abf58e5ec6acf7cf268d9a; ebe31c5080dda7f99e935b43e573fe0aa25c93f8; 6149600309757f286e29ad3f858ed32b40423908; 8a356d27587a1fc3d80d62c8344ae4aed2325700; 4fbe0cb0777b228e39243692bf29e2829060b8de; af5c7848417882012203ac21399977ebda695a2b; c125e647e2584c96b3ef0154cb4b00d185dae8ed; 3793a5f435fef59a901f5ba0d8ef43df88d97161; 0a39442979d6e678dd36bb443ad529c14e86a86e

- External Actions | papers: 703035b483c181953de1b55b5fd59cd4cd4cf211; 1db56be01aeb44ca0f3fcebb45180cab1e4cd82e; 8dc0b53b126e70f3e8561c47f0acea0e8e168a7f; a669ea57529f4db630043c8c75d8f840c485d24d; 3aaf6a2cbad5850ad81ab5c163599cb3d523436f; 880ef5392cd4f3bb91469ea0e3f3f8b11124a6aa; 0d4ebbd22abcd0549d437dd64c2f7d3f7e57dee9; c715914c388fa64dd8686cd8755e5adfebbf2388; 0671fd553dd670a4e820553a974bc48040ba0819; 0a6bc37a07a37e3573d36e10cc11669eca0ff903; d30b943f59c9830718ad545497a03ab9a6132f73; 4351aafc87034429a7d20cc31a7c1e7149d2030a; 12b233752c7097ea6525622bed238ae2d2193c5a; 4edaffbfe5c6545f12fb6e695b38eb1a0dc967ea; 3fa9f7aa5e8050b54e1aca41407c12922a6e4867; e516665a91d7e76c75796a106332882153323e6b; 7a1069dafaeb484e22f2473d5545f1e45ce30656; 9b7324a56ecb5600a9701c34028af2e5953d7275; 2f0028060a3a3187d3cbecc3b423dbcf8c8387c3; 3793a5f435fef59a901f5ba0d8ef43df88d97161
